rulings.Case Title: SAMANTHA LEE SETO MANAGEMENT, LLC VS. MARTHE SCHREIBER ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of And Motion For Award Of Mandatory Attorney'S Fees And Costs Awarded To Plaintiff On Defendant'S Anti-Slapp Motion
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday, February 1, 2017 line 7. PLAINTIFF 71 WATER PARTNERS' Motion For Award Of Mandatory Attorney'S Fees And Costs Awarded To Plaintiff On Defendant'S Anti-Slapp Motion GRANTED in the amount of $9,843; reasonable hours expended (23.16), including this motion, multiplied by reasonable hourly rate of $425. The Court has previously determined that Plaintiff Samantha Lee Seto Management, LLC is entitled to recover reasonable fees and this motion setting the amount is timely. = (501/REQ)
